ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "pseudo" TEXT /* Username or pseudonym of the user */,
  "favorite_platform" TEXT /* Favorite gaming platform of the user */,
  "favorite_game" TEXT /* Favorite game of the user */,
  "background" TEXT /* User's background description about their gaming history */,
  "img_url" TEXT /* URL of the image associated with the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio of the user */,
  "profile_views" INTEGER /* Number of times the user's profile has been viewed */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "achievements_count" INTEGER /* Number of achievements the user has earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform on which the game is available */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the game was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game (e.g., action, adventure, RPG) */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the game */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the game has received */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's cover image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the gaming platform */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the gaming platform */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the platform was released */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the platform's logo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the platform */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the platform's popularity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement earned */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was earned */,
  "achievement_description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "achievement_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the achievement's image */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Number of points earned with the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "community_name" TEXT /* Name of the gaming community */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the community */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the community was created */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community admin */,
  "member_count" INTEGER /* Number of members in the community */,
  "activity_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the community's activity level */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules of the community */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communities_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_members" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership record */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community the user is part of */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who joined the community */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the community */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the community (e.g., member, admin, moderator) */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Last date the user was active in the community */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_members_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow relationship */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "following_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the follow relationship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_following_id FOREIGN KEY ("following_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_games" (
  "user_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-game relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "play_time" INTEGER /* Total play time in minutes */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user to the game */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_games_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
